Input
0 0

Output
0 XNOR23 = XNOR(0,0) = 1
1 XNOR34 = XNOR(0,1) = 0
2 XNOR45 = XNOR(1,1) = 1

5 OR-NOT17 = OR(1,NOT(0)) = 1

\boxed{10110110}
